changes.change: Replaced buildStubResponse stub with callLlm() helper. executeInternal now POSTs to AI_ENGINE_URL/llm/complete with system+user messages and returns LLM content.

Implemented all 7 tool stubs. LLM tools (generate_code, create_workflow, scaffold_api, write_tests, review_code) call callLlm() with tool-specific prompts. Service tools (create_webhook, deploy_function) POST to WORKFLOW_SERVICE_URL when set, with local UUID fallback.
Replaced stub class definitions with re-exports of real agent implementations (CommsAgent, FinanceAgent, GrowthAgent, OpsAgent, ResearchAgent, ErpAgent, BuilderAgent).
